		if (t.loop !== void 0) {
			const e = _(t.loop) ? t.loop() : t.loop;
			e !== void 0 && (this.loop = e);
		}
		if (t.objectFit !== void 0) this.fitMode = this.resolveValue(t.objectFit) ?? void 0;
	}
	resolveValue(t) {
		if (t === void 0) return;
		const e = _(t) ? t() : t;
		return e && typeof e == "object" && "value" in e ? e.value : e;
	}
	resolvePoint(t) {
		const e = this.resolveValue(t);
		if (e != null) {
			if (typeof e == "number") return {
				x: e,
				y: e
			};
			if (Array.isArray(e)) {
				const [i, n] = e;
				return {
					x: i ?? 0,
					y: n ?? i ?? 0
				};
			}
			if (typeof e == "object") return {
				x: e.x ?? 0,
				y: e.y ?? 0
			};
		}
	}
	resolveSize(t) {
		const e = this.resolveValue(t);
		if (e != null) {
			if (typeof e == "number") return `${e}px`;
			if (typeof e == "string") return e;
		}
	}
	resolvePixelSize(t) {
		if (t) {
			if (t.endsWith("px")) {
				const e = parseFloat(t);
				return Number.isNaN(e) ? void 0 : e;
			}
			if (/^\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(t)) {
				const e = parseFloat(t);
				return Number.isNaN(e) ? void 0 : e;
			}
		}
	}
	toCssColor(t) {
		return `#${Math.max(0, Math.min(16777215, t)).toString(16).padStart(6, "0")}`;
	}
	applyDisplayProps(t) {
		if (!this.element) return;
		if (t.width !== void 0 ? this.explicitWidth = this.resolveSize(t.width) : this.explicitWidth = void 0, t.height !== void 0 ? this.explicitHeight = this.resolveSize(t.height) : this.explicitHeight = void 0, this.explicitWidth !== void 0 && (this.element.style.width = this.explicitWidth), this.explicitHeight !== void 0 && (this.element.style.height = this.explicitHeight), t.alpha !== void 0) {
			const r = this.resolveValue(t.alpha);
			r !== void 0 && (this.element.style.opacity = String(r));
		}
		if (t.visible !== void 0) {
			const r = this.resolveValue(t.visible);
			this.element.style.display = r === !1 ? "none" : "";
		}
		if (t.zIndex !== void 0) {
			const r = this.resolveValue(t.zIndex);
			r !== void 0 && (this.element.style.zIndex = String(r));
		}
		if (t.cursor !== void 0) {
			const r = this.resolveValue(t.cursor);
			r !== void 0 && (this.element.style.cursor = String(r));
		}
		if (t.tint !== void 0) {
			const r = this.resolveValue(t.tint);
			typeof r == "number" && (this.element.style.filter = `drop-shadow(0 0 0 ${this.toCssColor(r)})`);
		}

			t.x,
			t.y,
			t.scale,
			t.rotation,
			t.angle,
			t.skew,
			t.roundPixels
		].some((r) => r !== void 0)) {

			this.resolveValue(t.roundPixels) && (r = Math.round(r), a = Math.round(a));
			const c = this.resolvePoint(t.scale) ?? {
				x: 1,
				y: 1
			}, f = this.resolvePoint(t.skew), p = this.resolveValue(t.angle), o = this.resolveValue(t.rotation), h = p !== void 0 ? p : o !== void 0 ? o * 180 / Math.PI : 0, u = [`translate3d(${r}px, ${a}px, 0)`];
			if (h !== 0 && u.push(`rotate(${h}deg)`), f) {
				const d = f.x * 180 / Math.PI, m = f.y * 180 / Math.PI;
				(d !== 0 || m !== 0) && u.push(`skew(${d}deg, ${m}deg)`);
			}
			(c.x !== 1 || c.y !== 1) && u.push(`scale(${c.x}, ${c.y})`), this.element.style.transform = u.join(" ");
		}
		const i = this.resolvePoint(t.pivot), n = this.resolvePoint(t.anchor);
		i ? this.element.style.transformOrigin = `${i.x}px ${i.y}px` : n && (this.element.style.transformOrigin = `${n.x * 100}% ${n.y * 100}%`);
	}
	syncRenderElement() {
		if (this.element) {
			if (this.fitMode === "contain" && !(this.element instanceof HTMLImageElement)) {
				if (!this.isContained) {
					const t = document.createElement(this.renderElementType);
					this.element.style.position = "relative", this.element.style.overflow = "hidden", t.style.position = "absolute", t.style.left = "0", t.style.top = "0", t.style.transformOrigin = "0 0", this.element.appendChild(t), this.renderElement = t, this.isContained = !0;
				}
				return;
			}
			this.isContained && (this.renderElement && this.renderElement !== this.element && this.renderElement.remove(), this.renderElement = void 0, this.isContained = !1);
		}
	}
	getRenderElement() {
		return this.renderElement ?? this.element;
	}
	applyContainScale() {
		if (!this.isContained) return;
		const t = this.getRenderElement();
		if (!t || !this.element || this.frameWidth <= 0 || this.frameHeight <= 0) return;
		const e = this.resolvePixelSize(this.explicitWidth) ?? this.element.clientWidth, i = this.resolvePixelSize(this.explicitHeight) ?? this.element.clientHeight;
		if (!e || !i) return;
		const n = Math.min(e / this.frameWidth, i / this.frameHeight);
		!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0 || (t.style.transform = `scale(${n})`);
	}
	bindPlayingSignal(t) {
		const e = t.propObservables?.playing;
		!e || !_(e) || this.playingSignal !== e && (this.playingSubscription && (this.playingSubscription.unsubscribe(), this.playingSubscription = void 0), this.playingSignal = e, this.playing = e(), this.playingSubscription = e.observable.subscribe((i) => {
			this.playing = i === !0, this.playing || (this.elapsed = 0), this.updateAnimationLoop();
		}));
	}

		const i = t.propObservables?.sheet?.params;
		if (!(!i || typeof i != "object")) for (const n in i) {

			}));
		}
	}
	getFrames() {
		return this.frames && this.frames.length > 0 ? this.frames : this.rectangle ? [this.rectangle] : [];
	}
	normalizeIndex(t, e) {
		if (e <= 0) return 0;
		if (this.loop) {
			const i = t % e;
			return i < 0 ? i + e : i;
		}
		return t < 0 ? 0 : t >= e ? e - 1 : t;
	}
	render() {
		if (!this.element) return;
		const t = this.getRenderElement(), e = this.getCurrentSheetFrame();
		if (e) {
			this.applyFrame(e);
			return;
		}
		const i = this.getFrames();

			this.renderElementType === "img" && this.image && t ? t.src = this.image : this.image && (t.style.backgroundImage = `url("${this.image}")`);
			return;
		}

		n !== this.frameIndex && !this.loop && (this.frameIndex = n);
		const r = i[n];
		this.applyFrame(r);
	}
	applyFrame(t) {
		if (!this.element) return;
		const e = this.getRenderElement();
		if (!e) return;
		this.frameWidth = t.width, this.frameHeight = t.height, this.fitMode === "contain" ? (e.style.width = `${t.width}px`, e.style.height = `${t.height}px`) : (e.style.width = this.explicitWidth ?? `${t.width}px`, e.style.height = this.explicitHeight ?? `${t.height}px`);
		const i = t.x ?? 0, n = t.y ?? 0;
		if (this.renderElementType === "img") {
			const r = e;
			this.image && (r.src = this.image), r.style.objectFit = "none", r.style.objectPosition = `-${i}px -${n}px`, this.applyContainScale();
			return;
		}

	}
	updateAnimationLoop() {
		const t = this.sheetCurrentAnimation?.frames ?? [];
		(this.sheetCurrentAnimation ? this.playing && t.length > 1 : this.playing && !this.hasExternalFrameIndex && this.getFrames().length > 1 && this.fps > 0) ? this.startAnimationLoop() : this.stopAnimationLoop();
	}
	startAnimationLoop() {
		if ((this.tickSubscription || this.rafId !== void 0) && this.stopAnimationLoop(), this.isAnimating = !0, this.elapsed = 0, this.lastTickTimestamp = void 0, this.tickSignal?.observable) {
			this.tickSubscription = this.tickSignal.observable.subscribe((e) => {
				const i = e?.value ?? e;
				if (!i) return;
				if (this.sheetCurrentAnimation) {
					this.advanceSheet(i);
					return;
				}
				let n = i.deltaTime || 0;
				if (n <= 0) {
					const r = lt();
					if (this.lastTickTimestamp === void 0) {
						this.lastTickTimestamp = r;
						return;
					}
					n = r - this.lastTickTimestamp, this.lastTickTimestamp = r;
				}
				n > 0 && this.advance(n);
			});
			return;
		}
		const t = (e) => {
			if (!this.playing || this.hasExternalFrameIndex) {
				this.stopAnimationLoop();
				return;
			}
			this.lastRafTimestamp === void 0 && (this.lastRafTimestamp = e);
			const i = e - this.lastRafTimestamp;
			this.lastRafTimestamp = e, this.sheetCurrentAnimation ? this.advanceSheet({
				timestamp: e,
				deltaTime: i,
				frame: 0,
				deltaRatio: i / it(this.fps)
			}) : this.advance(i), Et() ? this.rafId = window.requestAnimationFrame(t) : this.rafId = setTimeout(() => {
				t(lt());
			}, it(this.fps));
		};
		Et() ? this.rafId = window.requestAnimationFrame(t) : this.rafId = setTimeout(() => {
			t(lt());
		}, it(this.fps));
	}
	stopAnimationLoop() {
		this.isAnimating = !1, this.tickSubscription && (this.tickSubscription.unsubscribe(), this.tickSubscription = void 0), this.rafId !== void 0 && (Et() ? window.cancelAnimationFrame(this.rafId) : clearTimeout(this.rafId), this.rafId = void 0, this.lastRafTimestamp = void 0), this.lastTickTimestamp = void 0;
	}
	advance(t) {
		const e = this.getFrames();
		if (!this.playing || e.length <= 1 || this.fps <= 0) return;
		this.elapsed += t;
		const i = it(this.fps);
		for (; this.elapsed >= i;) if (this.elapsed -= i, this.frameIndex += 1, !this.loop && this.frameIndex >= e.length) {
			this.frameIndex = e.length - 1;
			break;
		}
		this.render();
	}
};

	/**

	* 
	* @param containerId - Container identifier

function Vl(s) {

		if (!Number.isFinite(i) || i <= 0) return null;

			min: n,
			max: n + i - 1,
			size: i
		};
	}

	return !Number.isFinite(t) || !Number.isFinite(e) || e < t ? null : {
		min: t,
		max: e,
		size: e - t + 1
	};
}

}

		var length = Math.max(maxIndex + 1, DEFAULT_SLOTS);
		var slots = Array.from({ length }, function() {
			return null;
		});

			var index = Number(key);
			if (index < 0 || index >= length) return;
			slots[index] = normalizeSlotValue(list[key]);
		});
		return slots;
	};

			var list;

					case 3: return [2];
				}
			});
		});
	};

		return __awaiter(void 0, void 0, void 0, function() {

		});
	};

			selectedSlot.set(index);

		};

//#region node_modules/@rpgjs/client/dist/utils/getEntityProp.js
var entityPropMap = {
	level: (entity) => entity._level(),
	exp: (entity) => entity._exp(),
	gold: (entity) => entity._gold(),
	hp: (entity) => entity.hpSignal(),
	sp: (entity) => entity.spSignal(),
	name: (entity) => entity.name(),
	type: (entity) => entity.type(),
	x: (entity) => entity.x(),
	y: (entity) => entity.y(),
	z: (entity) => entity.z(),
	tint: (entity) => entity.tint(),
	direction: (entity) => entity.direction(),
	speed: (entity) => entity.speed(),
	hitbox: (entity) => entity.hitbox(),
	animation: (entity) => entity.animationName(),
	canMove: (entity) => entity.canMove(),
	graphics: (entity) => entity.graphics(),
	items: (entity) => entity.items(),
	equipments: (entity) => entity.equipments(),
	states: (entity) => entity.states(),
	skills: (entity) => entity.skills(),
	effects: (entity) => entity._effects(),
	componentsTop: (entity) => entity.componentsTop(),
	componentsBottom: (entity) => entity.componentsBottom(),
	componentsCenter: (entity) => entity.componentsCenter(),
	componentsLeft: (entity) => entity.componentsLeft(),
	componentsRight: (entity) => entity.componentsRight()
};
var isSignal$2 = (value) => typeof value === "function";
var toSignal = (value) => isSignal$2(value) ? value : K(() => value);
var getEntityProp = (entity, key) => {
	const entitySignal = toSignal(entity);
	return K(() => {
		const current = entitySignal();
		if (!current) return;
		if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(entityPropMap, key)) {
			const getter = entityPropMap[key];
			return getter(current);
		}
		if (key.startsWith("params.")) {
			const paramKey = key.slice(7);
			return current._param?.()?.[paramKey];
		}
	});
};

	});
	var currentSlot = K(function() {
		return slotList()[selectedTab()];
	});
	var equippedIds = K(function() {
		var _a, _b;
		var equipped = ((_b = (_a = currentPlayer()).equipments) === null || _b === void 0 ? void 0 : _b.call(_a)) || [];
		return new Set(equipped.map(function(it) {
			var _a, _b, _c;
			return (_c = (_b = (_a = it === null || it === void 0 ? void 0 : it.id) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.call(it)) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : it === null || it === void 0 ? void 0 : it.id) !== null && _c !== void 0 ? _c : it === null || it === void 0 ? void 0 : it.name;
		}));
	});
	var equippedOverrides = P({});
	H(function() {
		var next = {};
		safeEquips().forEach(function(item) {
			if ((item === null || item === void 0 ? void 0 : item.id) && typeof item.equipped === "boolean") next[item.id] = item.equipped;
		});
		equippedOverrides.set(next);
	});
	var itemEquipped = function(item) {
		if (!item) return false;
		var overrides = equippedOverrides();
		if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(overrides, item.id)) return overrides[item.id];
		if (typeof item.equipped === "boolean") return item.equipped;
		return equippedIds().has(item.id);
	};
	var slotTypes = function(slot) {
		if (!slot) return [];
		if (Array.isArray(slot.types)) return slot.types;
		if (slot.type) return [slot.type];
		if (slot.id) return [slot.id];
		return [];
	};
	var slotItems = K(function() {
		var slot = currentSlot();
		if (!slot) return [];
		var types = new Set(slotTypes(slot));
		return safeEquips().filter(function(item) {
			return item && types.has(item.type);
		});
	});
	var currentEquippedItem = K(function() {
		return slotItems().find(function(item) {
			return itemEquipped(item);
		}) || null;
	});
	var listEntries = K(function() {
		var items = slotItems().map(function(item) {
			return __assign(__assign({}, item), {
				kind: "item",
				tag: itemEquipped(item) ? "Equipped" : ""
			});
		});
		if (!currentEquippedItem()) return items;
		return __spreadArray([{
			id: "__unequip__",
			name: "Unequip",
			description: "Remove the current equipment",
			kind: "unequip",
			tag: ""
		}], items, true);
	});
	var currentEntry = K(function() {
		return listEntries()[selectedItem()];
	});
	var detailsItem = K(function() {
		var entry = currentEntry();
		if ((entry === null || entry === void 0 ? void 0 : entry.kind) === "item") return entry;
		return currentEquippedItem();
	});
	var equippedText = K(function() {
		var slot = currentSlot();
		if (!slot) return "";
		var equipped = currentEquippedItem();
		return equipped ? "".concat(slot.label, ": ").concat(equipped.name) : "".concat(slot.label, ": Empty");
	});
	K(function() {
		return listEntries().length === 0;
	});
	var nav = Ch(selectedItem, { count: function() {
		return listEntries().length;
	} }, "wrap");
	var playerParams = K(function() {
		var _a, _b;
		var menuData = data();
		if (menuData === null || menuData === void 0 ? void 0 : menuData.playerStats) return menuData.playerStats;
		if (menuData === null || menuData === void 0 ? void 0 : menuData.playerParams) return menuData.playerParams;
		return ((_b = (_a = currentPlayer()) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a._param) === null || _b === void 0 ? void 0 : _b.call(_a)) || {};
	});
	var statOrder = [
		"atk",
		"def",
		"pdef",
		"sdef",
		"str",
		"dex",
		"int",
		"agi",
		"maxHp",
		"maxSp"
	];
	var statLabels = {
		atk: "ATK",
		def: "DEF",
		pdef: "PDEF",
		sdef: "SDEF",
		str: "STR",
		dex: "DEX",
		int: "INT",
		agi: "AGI",
		maxHp: "MAX HP",
		maxSp: "MAX SP"
	};
	var getItemStats = function(item) {
		if (!item) return {};
		var stats = item.stats || item.params || {};
		if (Object.keys(stats).length) return stats;
		var keys = [
			"atk",
			"def",
			"pdef",
			"sdef",
			"str",
			"dex",
			"int",
			"agi",
			"maxHp",
			"maxSp"
		];
		var direct = {};
		keys.forEach(function(key) {
			if (item[key] !== void 0) direct[key] = item[key];
		});
		return direct;
	};
	var buildStatsList = function(deltaStats) {
		var params = playerParams() || {};
		var orderedKeys = statOrder.filter(function(key) {
			return deltaStats[key] !== void 0;
		});
		var extraKeys = Object.keys(deltaStats).filter(function(key) {
			return !statOrder.includes(key);
		});
		var keys = orderedKeys.concat(extraKeys);
		var list = [];
		for (var _i = 0, keys_1 = keys; _i < keys_1.length; _i++) {
			var key = keys_1[_i];
			var delta = deltaStats[key];
			if (delta === void 0 || delta === 0) continue;
			var current = params[key];
			if (current === void 0 && key === "def") current = params.pdef;
			var next = current !== void 0 ? current + delta : void 0;
			list.push({
				key,
				label: statLabels[key] || key.toUpperCase(),
				delta,
				current,
				next
			});
		}
		return list;
	};
	var displayStats = K(function() {
		var entry = currentEntry();
		var equipped = currentEquippedItem();
		if (!entry) return [];
		if (entry.kind === "unequip") {
			if (!equipped) return [];
			var stats_1 = getItemStats(equipped);
			var delta_1 = {};
			Object.keys(stats_1).forEach(function(key) {
				delta_1[key] = -stats_1[key];
			});
			return buildStatsList(delta_1);
		}
		if (entry.kind === "item") {
			var equippedStats_1 = getItemStats(equipped);
			var nextStats_1 = getItemStats(entry);
			var delta_2 = {};
			new Set(__spreadArray(__spreadArray([], Object.keys(nextStats_1), true), Object.keys(equippedStats_1), true)).forEach(function(key) {
				delta_2[key] = (nextStats_1[key] || 0) - (equippedStats_1[key] || 0);
			});
			return buildStatsList(delta_2);
		}
		return [];
	});
	var applyEquipState = function(slot, itemId, equip) {
		var types = slotTypes(slot);
		var next = __assign({}, equippedOverrides());
		if (types.length) safeEquips().forEach(function(item) {
			if (!item) return;
			if (types.includes(item.type)) next[item.id] = false;
		});
		if (itemId) next[itemId] = equip;
		equippedOverrides.set(next);
	};
	var commitSelection = function(index) {
		var entry = listEntries()[index];
		if (!entry) return;
		if (entry.kind === "unequip") {
			var equipped = currentEquippedItem();
			if (equipped && onInteraction) onInteraction("equipItem", {
				id: equipped.id,
				equip: false
			});
			applyEquipState(currentSlot(), equipped === null || equipped === void 0 ? void 0 : equipped.id, false);
			return;
		}
		if (entry.kind === "item" && onInteraction) {
			if (!itemEquipped(entry)) onInteraction("equipItem", {
				id: entry.id,
				equip: true
			});
			applyEquipState(currentSlot(), entry.id, true);
		}
	};
	function selectTab(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedTab.set(index);
			selectedItem.set(0);
		};
	}
	function selectItem(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedItem.set(index);
			commitSelection(index);
		};
	}
	var iconSheet = function(iconId) {
		return { definition: engine.getSpriteSheet(iconId) };
	};
	var controls = P({
		up: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.up,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!listEntries().length) return;
				nav.next(-1);
			}
		},
		left: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.left,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				var tabs = slotList();
				if (!tabs.length) return;
				selectedTab.update(function(value) {
					return (value - 1 + tabs.length) % tabs.length;
				});
				selectedItem.set(0);
			}
		},
		right: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.right,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				var tabs = slotList();
				if (!tabs.length) return;
				selectedTab.update(function(value) {
					return (value + 1) % tabs.length;
				});
				selectedItem.set(0);
			}
		},
		down: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.down,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!listEntries().length) return;
				nav.next(1);
			}
		},
		action: {
			bind: keyboardControls.action,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (!listEntries().length) return;
				commitSelection(selectedItem());
			}
		},
		escape: {
			bind: keyboardControls.escape,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (onBack) onBack();
			}
		},
		gamepad: { enabled: true }
	});
	H(function() {
		var count = listEntries().length;
		if (!count) {
			selectedItem.set(0);
			return;
		}
		if (selectedItem() >= count) selectedItem.set(count - 1);
	});
	return U(ph, {
		width: "100%",
		height: "100%"
	}, U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel rpg-ui-panel" }
	}, [U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-header" },
		textContent: "Equip"
	}), U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-body rpg-ui-menu-panel-body-stacked" }
	}, [U(Fl, { element: "div" }, U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details rpg-ui-panel" }
	}, U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-hero" }
	}, [U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-hero-icon" }
	}, U(mh, {
		sheet: K(() => iconSheet(detailsItem()?.icon)),
		playing: "default",
		width: "48px",
		height: "48px",
		objectFit: "contain"
	})), U(Fl, { element: "div" }, [
		U(Fl, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details-title" },
			textContent: K(() => detailsItem()?.name || currentSlot()?.label || "Equip")
		}),
		U(Fl, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details-desc" },
			textContent: K(() => detailsItem()?.description || "")
		}),
		Jl(K(() => displayStats().length > 0), () => U(Fl, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-equip-stats" }
		}, Kl(displayStats, (stat, index) => U(Fl, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: ["rpg-ui-equip-stat", {
				positive: stat.delta > 0,
				negative: stat.delta < 0
			}] }
		}, [
			U(Fl, {
				element: "div",
				attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-equip-stat-key" },
				textContent: stat.label
			}),
			U(Fl, {
				element: "div",
				attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-equip-stat-value" },
				textContent: stat.delta > 0 ? "+" : "" + stat.delta
			}),
			Jl(stat.current, () => U(Fl, {
				element: "div",
				attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-equip-stat-current" },
				textContent: stat.current + " -> " + stat.next
			}))
		])))),
		U(Fl, {
			element: "div",
			attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-details-meta" }
		}, U(Fl, {
			element: "span",
			textContent: K(() => equippedText())
		}))
	])]))), U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-panel-list rpg-ui-menu rpg-ui-menu-panel-list-full" }
	}, [U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-tabs" }
	}, Kl(slotList, (tab, tabIndex) => U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: {
			class: ["rpg-ui-menu-tab", K(() => ({ active: selectedTab() === tabIndex }))],
			tabindex: tabIndex,
			click: selectTab(tabIndex)
		},
		textContent: tab.label
	}))), U(vh, {
		tabindex: selectedItem,
		controls
	}, Kl(listEntries, (entry, index) => U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: {
			class: "rpg-ui-menu-item rpg-ui-menu-row",
			"data-selected": K(() => selectedItem() === index ? "true" : "false"),
			tabindex: index,
			click: selectItem(index)
		}
	}, [U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-main" }
	}, [U(Fl, {
		element: "div",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-icon" }
	}, Jl(entry?.icon, () => U(mh, {
		sheet: K(() => iconSheet(entry.icon)),
		playing: "default",
		width: "28px",
		height: "28px",
		objectFit: "contain"
	}))), U(Fl, {
		element: "span",
		textContent: entry.name
	})]), U(Fl, {
		element: "span",
		attrs: { class: "rpg-ui-menu-row-end" },
		textContent: entry.tag || ""
	})])))])])]));
}

//#region node_modules/@rpgjs/client/dist/components/gui/menu/main-menu.ce.js
function component$16($$props) {
	Q($$props);
	const defineProps = Sn$1($$props);
	var engine = inject(RpgClientEngine);
	var currentPlayer = engine.scene.currentPlayer;
	var keyboardControls = engine.globalConfig.keyboardControls;
	var _a = defineProps(), data = _a.data, onFinish = _a.onFinish, onInteraction = _a.onInteraction, _b = data(), menus = _b.menus;
	_b.items;
	_b.skills;
	_b.equips;
	var saveLoad = _b.saveLoad;
	var defaultMenus = [
		{
			id: "items",
			label: "Items"
		},
		{
			id: "skills",
			label: "Skills"
		},
		{
			id: "equip",
			label: "Equip"
		},
		{
			id: "options",
			label: "Options"
		},
		{
			id: "save",
			label: "Save"
		},
		{
			id: "exit",
			label: "Exit"
		}
	];
	var menuEntries = K(function() {
		if (menus && Array.isArray(menus) && menus.length) return menus;
		return defaultMenus;
	});
	var resolveProp = function(value) {
		return typeof value === "function" ? value() : value;
	};
	var saveLoadData = K(function() {
		return resolveProp(saveLoad) || {};
	});
	K(function() {
		return saveLoadData().mode || "load";
	});
	K(function() {
		return saveLoadData().slots || [];
	});
	var saveLoadCanSave = K(function() {
		return saveLoadData().canSave !== false;
	});
	var isMenuDisabled = function(entry) {
		if (!entry) return true;
		if (entry.disabled) return true;
		if (entry.enabled === false) return true;
		if (entry.id === "save" && !saveLoadCanSave()) return true;
		return false;
	};
	var selectedMenu = P(0);
	var view = P("menu");
	var saveOverlay = P(false);
	var selectableIndexes = K(function() {
		return menuEntries().map(function(entry, index) {
			return isMenuDisabled(entry) ? null : index;
		}).filter(function(value) {
			return value !== null;
		});
	});
	H(function() {
		var available = selectableIndexes();
		if (!available.length) return;
		var current = selectedMenu();
		if (!available.includes(current)) selectedMenu.set(available[0]);
	});
	var moveMenu = function(delta) {
		var available = selectableIndexes();
		if (!available.length) return;
		var current = selectedMenu();
		var nextIndex = (Math.max(0, available.indexOf(current)) + delta + available.length) % available.length;
		selectedMenu.set(available[nextIndex]);
	};
	function selectMenu(index) {
		return function() {
			selectedMenu.set(index);
			openMenu();
		};
	}
	var openMenu = function() {
		var entry = menuEntries()[selectedMenu()];
		if (!entry || isMenuDisabled(entry)) return;
		if (entry.id === "save") {
			saveOverlay.set(true);
			return;
		}
		if (entry.id === "exit") {
			view.set("exit");
			return;
		}
		view.set(entry.id);
	};
	var goBack = function() {
		delay(function() {
			view.set("menu");
		});
	};
	var closeSaveOverlay = function() {
		delay(function() {
			saveOverlay.set(false);
			view.set("menu");
		});
	};
	var confirmExit = function() {
		if (onInteraction) onInteraction("exit");
	};
	var hp = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "hp");
	var hpMax = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "params.maxHp");
	var sp = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "sp");
	var spMax = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "params.maxSp");
	var level = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "level");
	var exp = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "exp");
	var gold = getEntityProp(currentPlayer, "gold");
	var expForNextlevel = K(function() {
		return data().expForNextlevel || 0;
	});
	var hpPercent = K(function() {
		var max = hpMax() || 1;
		return "".concat(Math.max(0, Math.min(100, hp() / max * 100)), "%");
	});
	var spPercent = K(function() {
		var max = spMax() || 1;
		return "".concat(Math.max(0, Math.min(100, sp() / max * 100)), "%");
	});
	var expPercent = K(function() {
		var max = expForNextlevel() || 1;
		return "".concat(Math.max(0, Math.min(100, exp() / max * 100)), "%");
	});
	var paramsList = K(function() {
		return [
			{
				label: "ATK",
				value: data().playerStats.atk
			},
			{
				label: "PDEF",
				value: data().playerStats.pdef
			},
			{
				label: "SDEF",
				value: data().playerStats.sdef
			},
			{
				label: "STR",
				value: data().playerStats.str
			},
			{
				label: "DEX",
				value: data().playerStats.dex
			},
			{
				label: "INT",
				value: data().playerStats.int
			},
			{
				label: "AGI",
				value: data().playerStats.agi
			}
		];
	});
	var menuControls = P({
		up: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.up,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (saveOverlay()) return;
				if (view() !== "menu") return;
				moveMenu(-1);
			}
		},
		down: {
			repeat: true,
			bind: keyboardControls.down,
			throttle: 150,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (saveOverlay()) return;
				if (view() !== "menu") return;
				moveMenu(1);
			}
		},
		action: {
			bind: keyboardControls.action,
			keyDown: function() {
				if (saveOverlay()) return;
				if (view() !== "menu") return;
				openMenu();
			}
		},
		escape: {

function component$15($$props) {

	Sn$1($$props);

		return engine.notificationManager.stack();
	});
	var iconSheet = function(iconId) {
		return {
			definition: engine.getSpriteSheet(iconId),
			playing: "default"
		};
	};
	H(function() {
		var list = notifications();
		var rowHeight = 68;
		list.forEach(function(notif, index) {
			notif.layoutY.set(index * rowHeight);
		});
	});
	var notificationStyle = function(notif) {
		return {
			opacity: notif.opacity(),
			transform: "translateY(".concat(notif.layoutY() + notif.offset(), "px)")
		};
	};

		width: "100%",
		height: "100%",
		zIndex: 100,

		element: "div",

		element: "div",

			class: "rpg-ui-notification",

		}

		element: "div",

	});

function pipeFromArray(fns) {

	if (fns.length === 1) return fns[0];
	return function piped(input) {
		return fns.reduce(function(prev, fn) {
			return fn(prev);

	};

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/observable/innerFrom.js
function innerFrom(input) {
	if (input instanceof Observable) return input;
	if (input != null) {
		if (isInteropObservable(input)) return fromInteropObservable(input);
		if (isArrayLike(input)) return fromArrayLike(input);
		if (isPromise$1(input)) return fromPromise(input);
		if (isAsyncIterable(input)) return fromAsyncIterable(input);
		if (isIterable(input)) return fromIterable(input);
		if (isReadableStreamLike(input)) return fromReadableStreamLike(input);
	}
	throw createInvalidObservableTypeError(input);
}
function fromInteropObservable(obj) {

		}).then(null, reportUnhandledError);
	});
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/util/executeSchedule.js
function executeSchedule(parentSubscription, scheduler, work, delay, repeat) {
	if (delay === void 0) delay = 0;
	if (repeat === void 0) repeat = false;
	var scheduleSubscription = scheduler.schedule(function() {
		work();
		if (repeat) parentSubscription.add(this.schedule(null, delay));
		else this.unsubscribe();
	}, delay);
	parentSubscription.add(scheduleSubscription);
	if (!repeat) return scheduleSubscription;
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/observeOn.js
function observeOn(scheduler, delay) {
	if (delay === void 0) delay = 0;
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			return executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function() {
				return subscriber.next(value);
			}, delay);
		}, function() {
			return executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function() {
				return subscriber.complete();
			}, delay);
		}, function(err) {
			return executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function() {
				return subscriber.error(err);
			}, delay);
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/subscribeOn.js
function subscribeOn(scheduler, delay) {
	if (delay === void 0) delay = 0;
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		subscriber.add(scheduler.schedule(function() {
			return source.subscribe(subscriber);
		}, delay));
	});
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/scheduled/scheduleObservable.js
function scheduleObservable(input, scheduler) {
	return innerFrom(input).pipe(subscribeOn(scheduler), observeOn(scheduler));
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/scheduled/schedulePromise.js
function schedulePromise(input, scheduler) {

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/scheduled/scheduleArray.js
function scheduleArray(input, scheduler) {
	return new Observable(function(subscriber) {
		var i = 0;
		return scheduler.schedule(function() {
			if (i === input.length) subscriber.complete();
			else {
				subscriber.next(input[i++]);
				if (!subscriber.closed) this.schedule();
			}
		});
	});
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/scheduled/scheduleAsyncIterable.js
function scheduleAsyncIterable(input, scheduler) {
	if (!input) throw new Error("Iterable cannot be null");
	return new Observable(function(subscriber) {
		executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function() {
			var iterator = input[Symbol.asyncIterator]();
			executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, function() {
				iterator.next().then(function(result) {
					if (result.done) subscriber.complete();
					else subscriber.next(result.value);
				});
			}, 0, true);
		});
	});
}

//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/scheduled/scheduled.js
function scheduled(input, scheduler) {
	if (input != null) {
		if (isInteropObservable(input)) return scheduleObservable(input, scheduler);
		if (isArrayLike(input)) return scheduleArray(input, scheduler);
		if (isPromise$1(input)) return schedulePromise(input, scheduler);
		if (isAsyncIterable(input)) return scheduleAsyncIterable(input, scheduler);
		if (isIterable(input)) return scheduleIterable(input, scheduler);
		if (isReadableStreamLike(input)) return scheduleReadableStreamLike(input, scheduler);
	}
	throw createInvalidObservableTypeError(input);
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/observable/from.js
function from(input, scheduler) {
	return scheduler ? scheduled(input, scheduler) : innerFrom(input);
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/util/EmptyError.js
var EmptyError = createErrorClass(function(_super) {
	return function EmptyErrorImpl() {
		_super(this);
		this.name = "EmptyError";
		this.message = "no elements in sequence";
	};
});
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/lastValueFrom.js
function lastValueFrom(source, config) {
	var hasConfig = typeof config === "object";
	return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
		var _hasValue = false;
		var _value;
		source.subscribe({
			next: function(value) {
				_value = value;
				_hasValue = true;
			},
			error: reject,
			complete: function() {
				if (_hasValue) resolve(_value);
				else if (hasConfig) resolve(config.defaultValue);
				else reject(new EmptyError());
			}
		});
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/map.js
function map(project, thisArg) {
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		var index = 0;
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			subscriber.next(project.call(thisArg, value, index++));
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/util/mapOneOrManyArgs.js
var isArray$1 = Array.isArray;
function callOrApply(fn, args) {
	return isArray$1(args) ? fn.apply(void 0, __spreadArray([], __read(args))) : fn(args);
}
function mapOneOrManyArgs(fn) {
	return map(function(args) {
		return callOrApply(fn, args);
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/util/argsArgArrayOrObject.js
var isArray = Array.isArray;
var getPrototypeOf = Object.getPrototypeOf, objectProto = Object.prototype, getKeys = Object.keys;
function argsArgArrayOrObject(args) {
	if (args.length === 1) {
		var first_1 = args[0];
		if (isArray(first_1)) return {
			args: first_1,
			keys: null
		};
		if (isPOJO(first_1)) {
			var keys = getKeys(first_1);
			return {
				args: keys.map(function(key) {
					return first_1[key];
				}),
				keys
			};
		}
	}
	return {
		args,
		keys: null
	};
}
function isPOJO(obj) {
	return obj && typeof obj === "object" && getPrototypeOf(obj) === objectProto;
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/util/createObject.js
function createObject(keys, values) {
	return keys.reduce(function(result, key, i) {
		return result[key] = values[i], result;
	}, {});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/observable/combineLatest.js
function combineLatest() {
	var args = [];
	for (var _i = 0; _i < arguments.length; _i++) args[_i] = arguments[_i];
	var scheduler = popScheduler(args);
	var resultSelector = popResultSelector(args);
	var _a = argsArgArrayOrObject(args), observables = _a.args, keys = _a.keys;
	if (observables.length === 0) return from([], scheduler);
	var result = new Observable(combineLatestInit(observables, scheduler, keys ? function(values) {
		return createObject(keys, values);
	} : identity));
	return resultSelector ? result.pipe(mapOneOrManyArgs(resultSelector)) : result;
}
function combineLatestInit(observables, scheduler, valueTransform) {
	if (valueTransform === void 0) valueTransform = identity;
	return function(subscriber) {
		maybeSchedule(scheduler, function() {
			var length = observables.length;
			var values = new Array(length);
			var active = length;
			var remainingFirstValues = length;
			var _loop_1 = function(i) {
				maybeSchedule(scheduler, function() {
					var source = from(observables[i], scheduler);
					var hasFirstValue = false;
					source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
						values[i] = value;
						if (!hasFirstValue) {
							hasFirstValue = true;
							remainingFirstValues--;
						}
						if (!remainingFirstValues) subscriber.next(valueTransform(values.slice()));
					}, function() {
						if (!--active) subscriber.complete();
					}));
				}, subscriber);
			};
			for (var i = 0; i < length; i++) _loop_1(i);
		}, subscriber);
	};
}
function maybeSchedule(scheduler, execute, subscription) {
	if (scheduler) executeSchedule(subscription, scheduler, execute);
	else execute();
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/mergeInternals.js
function mergeInternals(source, subscriber, project, concurrent, onBeforeNext, expand, innerSubScheduler, additionalFinalizer) {
	var buffer = [];
	var active = 0;
	var index = 0;
	var isComplete = false;
	var checkComplete = function() {
		if (isComplete && !buffer.length && !active) subscriber.complete();
	};
	var outerNext = function(value) {
		return active < concurrent ? doInnerSub(value) : buffer.push(value);
	};
	var doInnerSub = function(value) {
		expand && subscriber.next(value);
		active++;
		var innerComplete = false;
		innerFrom(project(value, index++)).subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(innerValue) {
			onBeforeNext === null || onBeforeNext === void 0 || onBeforeNext(innerValue);
			if (expand) outerNext(innerValue);
			else subscriber.next(innerValue);
		}, function() {
			innerComplete = true;
		}, void 0, function() {
			if (innerComplete) try {
				active--;
				var _loop_1 = function() {
					var bufferedValue = buffer.shift();
					if (innerSubScheduler) executeSchedule(subscriber, innerSubScheduler, function() {
						return doInnerSub(bufferedValue);
					});
					else doInnerSub(bufferedValue);
				};
				while (buffer.length && active < concurrent) _loop_1();
				checkComplete();
			} catch (err) {
				subscriber.error(err);
			}
		}));
	};
	source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, outerNext, function() {
		isComplete = true;
		checkComplete();
	}));
	return function() {
		additionalFinalizer === null || additionalFinalizer === void 0 || additionalFinalizer();
	};
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/mergeMap.js
function mergeMap(project, resultSelector, concurrent) {
	if (concurrent === void 0) concurrent = Infinity;
	if (isFunction$1(resultSelector)) return mergeMap(function(a, i) {
		return map(function(b, ii) {
			return resultSelector(a, b, i, ii);
		})(innerFrom(project(a, i)));
	}, concurrent);
	else if (typeof resultSelector === "number") concurrent = resultSelector;
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		return mergeInternals(source, subscriber, project, concurrent);
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/mergeAll.js
function mergeAll(concurrent) {
	if (concurrent === void 0) concurrent = Infinity;
	return mergeMap(identity, concurrent);
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/concatAll.js
function concatAll() {
	return mergeAll(1);
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/observable/concat.js
function concat() {
	var args = [];
	for (var _i = 0; _i < arguments.length; _i++) args[_i] = arguments[_i];
	return concatAll()(from(args, popScheduler(args)));
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/filter.js
function filter(predicate, thisArg) {
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		var index = 0;
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			return predicate.call(thisArg, value, index++) && subscriber.next(value);
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/take.js
function take(count) {
	return count <= 0 ? function() {
		return EMPTY;
	} : operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		var seen = 0;
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			if (++seen <= count) {
				subscriber.next(value);
				if (count <= seen) subscriber.complete();
			}
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/finalize.js
function finalize(callback) {
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		try {
			source.subscribe(subscriber);
		} finally {
			subscriber.add(callback);
		}
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/pairwise.js
function pairwise() {
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		var prev;
		var hasPrev = false;
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			var p = prev;
			prev = value;
			hasPrev && subscriber.next([p, value]);
			hasPrev = true;
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/startWith.js
function startWith() {
	var values = [];
	for (var _i = 0; _i < arguments.length; _i++) values[_i] = arguments[_i];
	var scheduler = popScheduler(values);
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		(scheduler ? concat(values, source, scheduler) : concat(values, source)).subscribe(subscriber);
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm5/internal/operators/switchMap.js
function switchMap(project, resultSelector) {
	return operate(function(source, subscriber) {
		var innerSubscriber = null;
		var index = 0;
		var isComplete = false;
		var checkComplete = function() {
			return isComplete && !innerSubscriber && subscriber.complete();
		};
		source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(value) {
			innerSubscriber === null || innerSubscriber === void 0 || innerSubscriber.unsubscribe();
			var innerIndex = 0;
			var outerIndex = index++;
			innerFrom(project(value, outerIndex)).subscribe(innerSubscriber = createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function(innerValue) {
				return subscriber.next(resultSelector ? resultSelector(value, innerValue, outerIndex, innerIndex++) : innerValue);
			}, function() {
				innerSubscriber = null;
				checkComplete();
			}));
		}, function() {
			isComplete = true;
			checkComplete();
		}));
	});
}
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/@rpgjs/client/dist/Gui/Gui.js
var throwError = (id) => {
	throw `The GUI named ${id} is non-existent. Please add the component in the gui property of the decorator @RpgClient`;
};
var updateItemQuantity = (items, id) => {
	const index = items.findIndex((item) => item?.id === id);
	if (index === -1) return items;
	const item = items[index];
	if (item?.usable === false) return items;
	if (item?.consumable === false) return items;
	const quantity = typeof item?.quantity === "number" ? item.quantity : 1;
	const nextQuantity = Math.max(0, quantity - 1);
	if (nextQuantity === quantity) return items;
	if (nextQuantity <= 0) return items.filter((_, idx) => idx !== index);
	const nextItems = items.slice();
	nextItems[index] = {
		...item,
		quantity: nextQuantity
	};
	return nextItems;
};
var updateEquippedFlag = (items, id, equip) => {
	const index = items.findIndex((item) => item?.id === id);
	if (index === -1) return items;
	const item = items[index];
	if (item?.equipped === equip) return items;
	const nextItems = items.slice();
	nextItems[index] = {
		...item,
		equipped: equip
	};
	return nextItems;
};
var mainMenuOptimisticReducer = (data, action) => {
	if (!data || typeof data !== "object") return data;
	if (action.name === "useItem") {
		if (!Array.isArray(data.items)) return data;
		const id = action.data?.id;
		if (!id) return data;
		const nextItems = updateItemQuantity(data.items, id);
		if (nextItems === data.items) return data;
		return {
			...data,
			items: nextItems
		};
	}
	if (action.name === "equipItem") {
		const id = action.data?.id;
		if (!id || typeof action.data?.equip !== "boolean") return data;
		const equip = action.data.equip;
		let nextItems = data.items;
		let nextEquips = data.equips;
		if (Array.isArray(data.items)) nextItems = updateEquippedFlag(data.items, id, equip);
		if (Array.isArray(data.equips)) nextEquips = updateEquippedFlag(data.equips, id, equip);
		if (nextItems === data.items && nextEquips === data.equips) return data;
		return {
			...data,
			...nextItems !== data.items ? { items: nextItems } : {},
			...nextEquips !== data.equips ? { equips: nextEquips } : {}
		};
	}
	return data;
};
var RpgGui = class {
	constructor(context) {
		this.context = context;
		this.gui = P({});
		this.extraGuis = [];
		this.vueGuiInstance = null;
		this.optimisticReducers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();
		this.pendingActions = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();
		this.attachedGuiDisplayState = P({});
		this.webSocket = inject$1(context, WebSocketToken);
		this.add({
			name: "rpg-dialog",
			component: component$5
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.MainMenu,
			component: component$16
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.Shop,
			component: component$23
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.Notification,
			component: component$15,
			autoDisplay: true
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.Save,
			component: component$22
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.TitleScreen,
			component: component$14
		});
		this.add({
			name: PrebuiltGui.Gameover,
			component: component$13
		});
		this.registerOptimisticReducer(PrebuiltGui.MainMenu, mainMenuOptimisticReducer);
	}
	async _initialize() {
		this.webSocket.on("gui.open", (data) => {
			this.clearPendingActions(data.guiId);
			this.display(data.guiId, data.data);
		});
		this.webSocket.on("gui.exit", (guiId) => {
			this.hide(guiId);
		});
		this.webSocket.on("gui.update", (payload) => {
			this.applyServerUpdate(payload.guiId, payload.data, payload.clientActionId);
		});
		/**
		* Listen for tooltip display state changes from server
		* This is triggered by showAttachedGui/hideAttachedGui on the server
		*/
		this.webSocket.on("gui.tooltip", (data) => {
			const currentState = { ...this.attachedGuiDisplayState() };
			data.players.forEach((playerId) => {
				currentState[playerId] = data.display;
			});
			this.attachedGuiDisplayState.set(currentState);
		});
	}
	/**
	* Set the VueGui instance reference for Vue component management
	* This is called by VueGui when it's initialized
	* 
	* @param vueGuiInstance - The VueGui instance
	*/
	_setVueGuiInstance(vueGuiInstance) {
		this.vueGuiInstance = vueGuiInstance;
	}
	/**
	* Notify VueGui about GUI state changes
	* This synchronizes the Vue component display state
	* 
	* @param guiId - The GUI component ID
	* @param display - Display state
	* @param data - Component data
	*/
	_notifyVueGui(guiId, display, data = {}) {
		if (this.vueGuiInstance && this.vueGuiInstance.vm) {
			const extraGui = this.extraGuis.find((gui) => gui.name === guiId);
			if (extraGui) {
				this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui[guiId] = {
					name: guiId,
					display,
					data,
					attachToSprite: extraGui.attachToSprite || false
				};
				this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui = Object.assign({}, this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui);
			}
		}
	}
	/**
	* Initialize Vue components in the VueGui instance
	* This should be called after VueGui is mounted
	*/
	_initializeVueComponents() {
		if (this.vueGuiInstance && this.vueGuiInstance.vm) {
			this.extraGuis.forEach((gui) => {
				this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui[gui.name] = {
					name: gui.name,
					display: gui.display(),
					data: gui.data(),
					attachToSprite: gui.attachToSprite || false
				};
			});
			this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui = Object.assign({}, this.vueGuiInstance.vm.gui);
		}
	}
	guiInteraction(guiId, name, data) {
		const clientActionId = globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`;
		const actionData = {
			...data || {},
			clientActionId
		};
		this.applyOptimisticAction({
			guiId,
			name,
			data: actionData,
			clientActionId
		});
		this.webSocket.emit("gui.interaction", {
			guiId,
			name,
			data: actionData
		});
	}
	guiClose(guiId, data) {
		this.webSocket.emit("gui.exit", {
			guiId,
			data
		});
	}
	/**
	* Add a GUI component to the system
	* 
	* By default, only CanvasEngine components (.ce files) are accepted.
	* Vue components should be handled by the @rpgjs/vue package.
	* 
	* @param gui - GUI configuration options
	* @param gui.name - Name or ID of the GUI component
	* @param gui.id - Alternative ID if name is not provided
	* @param gui.component - The component to render (must be a CanvasEngine component)
	* @param gui.display - Initial display state (default: false)
	* @param gui.data - Initial data for the component
	* @param gui.autoDisplay - Auto display when added (default: false)
	* @param gui.dependencies - Function returning Signal dependencies
	* @param gui.attachToSprite - Attach GUI to sprites instead of global display (default: false)
	* 
	* @example
	* ```ts
	* gui.add({
	*   name: 'inventory',
	*   component: InventoryComponent, // Must be a .ce component
	*   autoDisplay: true,
	*   dependencies: () => [playerSignal, inventorySignal]
	* });
	* 
	* // Attach to sprites
	* gui.add({
	*   name: 'tooltip',
	*   component: TooltipComponent,
	*   attachToSprite: true
	* });
	* ```
	*/
	add(gui) {
		const guiId = gui.name || gui.id;
		if (!guiId) throw new Error("GUI must have a name or id");
		const guiInstance = {
			name: guiId,
			component: gui.component,
			display: P(gui.display || false),
			data: P(gui.data || {}),
			autoDisplay: gui.autoDisplay || false,
			dependencies: gui.dependencies ? gui.dependencies() : [],
			attachToSprite: gui.attachToSprite || false
		};
		if (typeof gui.component !== "function") {
			guiInstance.component = gui;
			this.extraGuis.push(guiInstance);
			if (guiInstance.autoDisplay) this._notifyVueGui(guiId, true, gui.data || {});
			return;
		}
		this.gui()[guiId] = guiInstance;
		if (guiInstance.autoDisplay && typeof gui.component === "function") this.display(guiId, gui.data);
	}
	registerOptimisticReducer(guiId, reducer) {
		const existing = this.optimisticReducers.get(guiId) || [];
		this.optimisticReducers.set(guiId, existing.concat(reducer));
	}
	/**
	* Get all attached GUI components (attachToSprite: true)
	* 
	* Returns all GUI instances that are configured to be attached to sprites.
	* These GUIs should be rendered in character.ce instead of canvas.ce.
	* 
	* @returns Array of GUI instances with attachToSprite: true
	* 
	* @example
	* ```ts
	* const attachedGuis = gui.getAttachedGuis();
	* // Use in character.ce to render tooltips
	* ```
	*/
	getAttachedGuis() {
		const allGuis = this.getAll();
		return Object.values(allGuis).filter((gui) => gui.attachToSprite === true);
	}
	/**
	* Check if a player should display attached GUIs
	* 
	* @param playerId - The player ID to check
	* @returns true if attached GUIs should be displayed for this player
	*/
	shouldDisplayAttachedGui(playerId) {
		return this.attachedGuiDisplayState()[playerId] === true;
	}
	get(id) {
		const canvasGui = this.gui()[id];
		if (canvasGui) return canvasGui;
		return this.extraGuis.find((gui) => gui.name === id);
	}
	exists(id) {
		return !!this.get(id);
	}
	getAll() {
		const allGuis = { ...this.gui() };
		this.extraGuis.forEach((gui) => {
			allGuis[gui.name] = gui;
		});
		return allGuis;
	}
	/**
	* Display a GUI component
	* 
	* Displays the GUI immediately if no dependencies are configured,
	* or waits for all dependencies to be resolved if dependencies are present.
	* Automatically manages subscriptions to prevent memory leaks.
	* Works with both CanvasEngine components and Vue components.
	* 
	* @param id - The GUI component ID
	* @param data - Data to pass to the component
	* @param dependencies - Optional runtime dependencies (overrides config dependencies)
	* 
	* @example
	* ```ts
	* // Display immediately
	* gui.display('inventory', { items: [] });
	* 
	* // Display with runtime dependencies
	* gui.display('shop', { shopId: 1 }, [playerSignal, shopSignal]);
	* ```
	*/
	display(id, data = {}, dependencies = []) {
		if (!this.exists(id)) throw throwError(id);
		const guiInstance = this.get(id);
		if (this.extraGuis.some((gui) => gui.name === id)) this._handleVueComponentDisplay(id, data, dependencies, guiInstance);
		else {
			guiInstance.data.set(data);
			guiInstance.display.set(true);
		}
	}
	isDisplaying(id) {
		const guiInstance = this.get(id);
		if (!guiInstance) return false;
		return guiInstance.display();
	}
	/**
	* Handle Vue component display logic
	* 
	* @param id - GUI component ID
	* @param data - Component data
	* @param dependencies - Runtime dependencies
	* @param guiInstance - GUI instance
	*/
	_handleVueComponentDisplay(id, data, dependencies, guiInstance) {
		if (guiInstance.subscription) {
			guiInstance.subscription.unsubscribe();
			guiInstance.subscription = void 0;
		}
		const deps = dependencies.length > 0 ? dependencies : guiInstance.dependencies ? guiInstance.dependencies() : [];
		if (deps.length > 0) {
			guiInstance.subscription = combineLatest(deps.map((dependency) => dependency.observable)).subscribe((values) => {
				if (values.every((value) => value !== void 0)) {
					guiInstance.data.set(data);
					guiInstance.display.set(true);
					this._notifyVueGui(id, true, data);
				}
			});
			return;
		}
		guiInstance.data.set(data);
		guiInstance.display.set(true);
		this._notifyVueGui(id, true, data);
	}
	/**
	* Hide a GUI component
	* 
	* Hides the GUI and cleans up any active subscriptions.
	* Works with both CanvasEngine components and Vue components.
	* 
	* @param id - The GUI component ID
	* 
	* @example
	* ```ts
	* gui.hide('inventory');
	* ```
	*/
	hide(id) {
		if (!this.exists(id)) throw throwError(id);
		const guiInstance = this.get(id);
		if (guiInstance.subscription) {
			guiInstance.subscription.unsubscribe();
			guiInstance.subscription = void 0;
		}
		guiInstance.display.set(false);
		if (this.extraGuis.some((gui) => gui.name === id)) this._notifyVueGui(id, false);
	}
	isVueComponent(id) {
		return this.extraGuis.some((gui) => gui.name === id);
	}
	clearPendingActions(guiId) {
		this.pendingActions.delete(guiId);
	}
	applyReducers(guiId, data, actions) {
		const reducers = this.optimisticReducers.get(guiId);
		if (!reducers || reducers.length === 0) return data;
		let next = data;
		for (const action of actions) for (const reducer of reducers) {
			const updated = reducer(next, action);
			if (updated !== void 0 && updated !== null && updated !== next) next = updated;
		}
		return next;
	}
	applyOptimisticAction(action) {
		const guiInstance = this.get(action.guiId);
		if (!guiInstance) return;
		const reducers = this.optimisticReducers.get(action.guiId);
		if (!reducers || reducers.length === 0) return;
		const currentData = guiInstance.data();
		const nextData = this.applyReducers(action.guiId, currentData, [action]);
		if (nextData === currentData) return;
		guiInstance.data.set(nextData);
		const pending = this.pendingActions.get(action.guiId) || [];
		pending.push(action);
		this.pendingActions.set(action.guiId, pending);
		if (this.isVueComponent(action.guiId)) this._notifyVueGui(action.guiId, guiInstance.display(), nextData);
	}
	applyServerUpdate(guiId, data, clientActionId) {
		const guiInstance = this.get(guiId);
		if (!guiInstance) return;
		let pending = this.pendingActions.get(guiId) || [];
		if (clientActionId) pending = pending.filter((action) => action.clientActionId !== clientActionId);
		else pending = [];
		let nextData = data;
		if (pending.length) nextData = this.applyReducers(guiId, nextData, pending);
		guiInstance.data.set(nextData);
		this.pendingActions.set(guiId, pending);
		if (this.isVueComponent(guiId)) this._notifyVueGui(guiId, guiInstance.display(), nextData);
	}
};

var Fe = class {

		return this.__length;
	}

		return this.first == null ? this.first = this.last = t : (t.prev = this.last, this.last.next = t, this.last = t), t.list = this, this.__length++, this;
	}
	remove(t) {
		if (t.list != null) return this.first === this.last ? this.first = this.last = null : this.__length > 0 && (t === this.last ? (t.prev.next = null, this.last = t.prev) : t === this.first ? (t.next.prev = null, this.first = t.next) : (t.next.prev = t.prev, t.prev.next = t.next)), t.next = t.prev = t.list = null, this.__length--, this;
	}
	clear() {
		if (!this.first) return;
		let t = this.first;
		for (; t;) {
			let e = t.next;
			t.next = t.prev = t.list = null, t = e;
		}
		this.first = this.last = null;
	}
	toArray() {
		const t = [];
		if (!this.first) return t;
		let e = this.first;
		for (; e;) t.push(e), e = e.next;
		return t;
	}

var nt = class {
	static float(t, e) {
		return Math.random() * (e - t) + t;
	}
	static bool(t = .5) {
		return Math.random() < t;
	}
	static sign(t = .5) {
		return Math.random() < t ? 1 : -1;
	}
	static bit(t = .5) {
		return Math.random() < t ? 1 : 0;
	}
	static integer(t, e) {
		return Math.floor(Math.random() * (e - t) + t);
	}
};

(function(s) {
	s.Linear = "linear", s.EaseInQuad = "easeInQuad", s.EaseOutQuad = "easeOutQuad", s.EaseInOutQuad = "easeInOutQuad", s.EaseInCubic = "easeInCubic", s.EaseOutCubic = "easeOutCubic", s.EaseInOutCubic = "easeInOutCubic", s.EaseInQuart = "easeInQuart", s.EaseOutQuart = "easeOutQuart", s.EaseInOutQuart = "easeInOutQuart", s.EaseInQuint = "easeInQuint", s.EaseOutQuint = "easeOutQuint", s.EaseInOutQuint = "easeInOutQuint", s.EaseInSine = "easeInSine", s.EaseOutSine = "easeOutSine", s.EaseInOutSine = "easeInOutSine", s.EaseInExpo = "easeInExpo", s.EaseOutExpo = "easeOutExpo", s.EaseInOutExpo = "easeInOutExpo", s.EaseInCirc = "easeInCirc", s.EaseOutCirc = "easeOutCirc", s.EaseInOutCirc = "easeInOutCirc", s.EaseInElastic = "easeInElastic", s.EaseOutElastic = "easeOutElastic", s.EaseInOutElastic = "easeInOutElastic", s.EaseInBack = "easeInBack", s.EaseOutBack = "easeOutBack", s.EaseInOutBack = "easeInOutBack", s.EaseInBounce = "easeInBounce", s.EaseOutBounce = "easeOutBounce", s.EaseInOutBounce = "easeInOutBounce";
})(fi || (fi = {}));
var Ut = class Ut {
	static linear(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * t / r + e;
	}
	static easeInQuad(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * (t /= r) * t + e;
	}
	static easeOutQuad(t, e, i, r) {
		return -i * (t /= r) * (t - 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutQuad(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * t * t + e : -i / 2 * (--t * (t - 2) - 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInCubic(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * (t /= r) * t * t + e;
	}
	static easeOutCubic(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * ((t = t / r - 1) * t * t + 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutCubic(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * t * t * t + e : i / 2 * ((t -= 2) * t * t + 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInQuart(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * (t /= r) * t * t * t + e;
	}
	static easeOutQuart(t, e, i, r) {
		return -i * ((t = t / r - 1) * t * t * t - 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutQuart(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * t * t * t * t + e : -i / 2 * ((t -= 2) * t * t * t - 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInQuint(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * (t /= r) * t * t * t * t + e;
	}
	static easeOutQuint(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * ((t = t / r - 1) * t * t * t * t + 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutQuint(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * t * t * t * t * t + e : i / 2 * ((t -= 2) * t * t * t * t + 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInSine(t, e, i, r) {
		return -i * Math.cos(t / r * (Math.PI / 2)) + i + e;
	}
	static easeOutSine(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * Math.sin(t / r * (Math.PI / 2)) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutSine(t, e, i, r) {
		return -i / 2 * (Math.cos(Math.PI * t / r) - 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInExpo(t, e, i, r) {
		return t === 0 ? e : i * Math.pow(2, 10 * (t / r - 1)) + e;
	}
	static easeOutExpo(t, e, i, r) {
		return t === r ? e + i : i * (-Math.pow(2, -10 * t / r) + 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutExpo(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * Math.pow(2, 10 * (t - 1)) + e : i / 2 * (-Math.pow(2, -10 * --t) + 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInCirc(t, e, i, r) {
		return -i * (Math.sqrt(1 - (t /= r) * t) - 1) + e;
	}
	static easeOutCirc(t, e, i, r) {
		return i * Math.sqrt(1 - (t = t / r - 1) * t) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutCirc(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? -i / 2 * (Math.sqrt(1 - t * t) - 1) + e : i / 2 * (Math.sqrt(1 - (t -= 2) * t) + 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInElastic(t, e, i, r) {
		let l, c, o;
		return o = 1.70158, c = 0, l = i, t === 0 || (t /= r), c || (c = r * .3), l < Math.abs(i) ? (l = i, o = c / 4) : o = c / (2 * Math.PI) * Math.asin(i / l), -(l * Math.pow(2, 10 * (t -= 1)) * Math.sin((t * r - o) * (2 * Math.PI) / c)) + e;
	}
	static easeOutElastic(t, e, i, r) {
		let l, c, o;
		return o = 1.70158, c = 0, l = i, t === 0 || (t /= r), c || (c = r * .3), l < Math.abs(i) ? (l = i, o = c / 4) : o = c / (2 * Math.PI) * Math.asin(i / l), l * Math.pow(2, -10 * t) * Math.sin((t * r - o) * (2 * Math.PI) / c) + i + e;
	}
	static easeInOutElastic(t, e, i, r) {
		let l, c, o;
		return o = 1.70158, c = 0, l = i, t === 0 || (t /= r / 2), c || (c = r * (.3 * 1.5)), l < Math.abs(i) ? (l = i, o = c / 4) : o = c / (2 * Math.PI) * Math.asin(i / l), t < 1 ? -.5 * (l * Math.pow(2, 10 * (t -= 1)) * Math.sin((t * r - o) * (2 * Math.PI) / c)) + e : l * Math.pow(2, -10 * (t -= 1)) * Math.sin((t * r - o) * (2 * Math.PI) / c) * .5 + i + e;
	}
	static easeInBack(t, e, i, r, l) {
		return l === void 0 && (l = 1.70158), i * (t /= r) * t * ((l + 1) * t - l) + e;
	}
	static easeOutBack(t, e, i, r, l) {
		return l === void 0 && (l = 1.70158), i * ((t = t / r - 1) * t * ((l + 1) * t + l) + 1) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutBack(t, e, i, r, l) {
		return l === void 0 && (l = 1.70158), (t /= r / 2) < 1 ? i / 2 * (t * t * (((l *= 1.525) + 1) * t - l)) + e : i / 2 * ((t -= 2) * t * (((l *= 1.525) + 1) * t + l) + 2) + e;
	}
	static easeInBounce(t, e, i, r) {
		let l;
		return l = Ut.easeOutBounce(r - t, 0, i, r), i - l + e;
	}
	static easeOutBounce(t, e, i, r) {
		return (t /= r) < 1 / 2.75 ? i * (7.5625 * t * t) + e : t < 2 / 2.75 ? i * (7.5625 * (t -= 1.5 / 2.75) * t + .75) + e : t < 2.5 / 2.75 ? i * (7.5625 * (t -= 2.25 / 2.75) * t + .9375) + e : i * (7.5625 * (t -= 2.625 / 2.75) * t + .984375) + e;
	}
	static easeInOutBounce(t, e, i, r) {
		let l;
		return t < r / 2 ? (l = Ut.easeInBounce(t * 2, 0, i, r), l * .5 + e) : (l = Ut.easeOutBounce(t * 2 - r, 0, i, r), l * .5 + i * .5 + e);
	}
};

	constructor() {
		this.__hasCallback = !1, this._list = new Fe();
	}
	add(t, e, i) {

	}
	addOnce(t, e) {
		this._list.add(new ie(new di(t, e, !0))), this.__hasCallback = !0;
	}
	dispatch(...t) {
		const e = this._list;
		let i = e.first, r;
		for (; i;) {
			r = i.next;
			let l = !0;
			const c = i.data;
			c.callRate && c.calls % c.callRate != 0 && (l = !1), l && (c.callback.apply(c.scope, t), c.once && e.remove(i)), i = r;
		}
		this.__hasCallback = e.__length > 0;
	}
	remove(t) {
		const e = this._list;
		let i = e.first, r;
		for (; i;) {
			if (r = i.next, i.data.callback === t) {
				e.remove(i);
				return;
			}
			i = r;
		}
		this.__hasCallback = e.__length > 0;
	}
	removeAll() {
		this._list.clear(), this.__hasCallback = !1;
	}

	}
	update(t) {
		const e = this.time += t, i = this.duration;
		if (e >= i) {
			this.emitter.__removeParticle(this);
			return;
		}
		const r = this.component, l = e * t;
		if (this.useGravity) {
			const c = t / .0166666;
			if (r.x += this.moveSpeedX * c, r.y += this.moveSpeedY * c, this.moveSpeedY += this.gravity * c, this.useAlign && (r.rotation = Math.atan2(this.moveSpeedY, this.moveSpeedX)), this.useFloor && this.floorY > 0 && r.y > this.floorY) {

			}
		} else this.useMotion && (this.distanceEase ? (r.x = this.distanceEase(e, this.startX, this.deltaX, i), r.y = this.distanceEase(e, this.startY, this.deltaY, i)) : (r.x = this.deltaX * l + this.startX, r.y = this.deltaY * l + this.startY));

			}
		}
		this.emitter.__on.particleUpdated.__hasCallback && this.emitter.__on.particleUpdated.dispatch(this), this.__on.updated.__hasCallback && this.__on.updated.dispatch(this);
	}
	stop() {
		this.time = this.duration;
	}
	recycle() {
		this.emitter.__on.particleDied.__hasCallback && this.emitter.__on.particleDied.dispatch(this);
		const t = this.__on;
		if (t.died.__hasCallback && (t.died.dispatch(this), t.died.removeAll()), t.updated.__hasCallback && t.updated.removeAll(), t.bounced.__hasCallback && t.bounced.removeAll(), this._hasChildEmitters) {

	}
	dispose() {
		this.recycle(), this.__fx = null;
	}
	get x() {
		return this.component.x;
	}
	get y() {
		return this.component.y;
	}
	get on() {
		return this.__on;
	}

var jt = class jt {
	static sanitizeBundle(t) {

			const i = jt._presetStructure.emitter;
			jt.parse(e, i, jt._presetStructure.emitterSpawn);
		}
		for (let e of t.sequences) {
			const i = jt._presetStructure.sequence;
			jt.parse(e, i, jt._presetStructure.sequenceEffect);
		}
	}
	static parse(t, e, i) {
		for (let r in e) if (t[r] == null) t[r] = e[r];

			const l = t[r];
			if (typeof l != "object") continue;

			else for (let o of l) for (let g in i) o[g] ?? (o[g] = i[g]);
		}
	}

function te(s) {
	if (typeof s != "object" || s === null) return s;
	const t = Array.isArray(s) ? [] : {};
	for (const e in s) {
		const i = s[e];
		t[e] = te(i);
	}
	return t;
}
var Cr = function(s, t, e, i) {
	function r(l) {
		return l instanceof e ? l : new e(function(c) {
			c(l);
		});
	}
	return new (e || (e = Promise))(function(l, c) {
		function o(w) {
			try {
				S(i.next(w));
			} catch (I) {
				c(I);
			}
		}
		function g(w) {
			try {
				S(i.throw(w));
			} catch (I) {
				c(I);
			}
		}
		function S(w) {
			w.done ? l(w.value) : r(w.value).then(o, g);
		}
		S((i = i.apply(s, t || [])).next());
	});

var Ot = class Ot {
	constructor() {
		this.useBlendModes = !0, this.particleCount = 0, this.emitterCount = 0, this.effectSequenceCount = 0, this.maxParticles = 5e3, this.particleFac = 1, this._active = !1, this._effects = new Fe(), this.__containers = {}, this.clearCache(), this.start();
	}
	/**
	* Starts the process.
	*
	* @param {} - No parameters.
	* @return {} - No return value.
	*/
	start() {
		this._active = !0, this._timeElapsed = Date.now();
	}
	/**
	* Pauses the execution of the function.
	*
	* @param {}
	* @return {}
	*/
	pause() {
		this._active = !1;
	}
	/**
	* Updates the state of the object based on the elapsed time.
	*
	* @param {number} delta - The time delta to update by. Default is 1.
	*/
	update(t = 1) {
		if (!this.active) return;
		const e = Date.now();
		let i = (e - this._timeElapsed) * .001;
		i *= t;
		let l = this._effects.first, c;
		for (; l;) c = l.next, l.update(i), l = c;
		this._timeElapsed = e;
	}
	/**
	* Clears the cache by resetting all cache objects to empty values.
	*
	* @param {}
	* @return {}
	*/
	clearCache() {
		this._cache = {
			particles: [],
			mcs: [],
			sprites: [],
			effectSequences: [],
			emitters: [],
			cores: {}
		}, this._settingsCache = {
			mcs: {},
			sprites: {},
			emitters: {},
			effectSequences: {}
		}, this._nameMaps = {
			emitters: {},
			effectSequences: {}
		};
	}

	*
	* @param {number} value - The new value for the floorY property.
	*/
	setFloorY(t) {
		const e = this._settingsCache.emitters;
		for (let i in e) e[i].floorY = t;
	}
	/**
	* Disposes of all the effects in the list and clears the cache.
	*/
	dispose() {

		for (; e;) e.dispose(), e = e.next;
		t.clear(), this.clearCache();
	}
	/**
	* Loads the bundle files and returns a promise that resolves to the parsed sprite sheet result.
	*
	* @param {string} bundleSettingsUrl - The URL of the bundle settings.
	* @param {string} spritesheetUrl - The URL of the sprite sheet.
	* @param {string} spritesheetFilter - The filter for the sprite sheet. Default is an empty string.
	* @param {string[]} additionalAssets - An array of additional asset URLs. Default is an empty array.
	* @return {Promise<IParseSpriteSheetResult>} A promise that resolves to the parsed sprite sheet result.

				rfx_spritesheet: e,

	/**

	* @param {any} bundleSettings - The settings for the bundle.

	* @returns {IParseSpriteSheetResult} The result of parsing the sprite sheet.
	*/
	initBundle(t, e) {

		if (t.__v != Ot.settingsVersion) throw new Error("Settings version mismatch.");

			this.addParticleEmitter(r.id, r);
		}

			const r = t.sequences[i];
			this.addEffectSequence(r.id, r);
		}

	/**

	}
	/**

	/**

	}
	/**
	* Creates a particle emitter from the specified settings.

	* @param {IEmitterSettings} settings - The settings of the emitter to create.

				for (let ut = 0; ut < K; ut++) if (at(h, ot + ut) !== at(n, ut)) {
					ft = !1;
					break;
				}
				if (ft) return ot;
			}
			return -1;
		}

		o.prototype.write = function(n, a, p, E) {

				case "hex": return D(this, n, a, p);

			}

		function tt(h, n, a) {
			a = Math.min(h.length, a);
			const p = [];

			if (typeof n == "string") {
				if (typeof a == "string" ? (E = a, a = 0, p = this.length) : typeof p == "string" && (E = p, p = this.length), E !== void 0 && typeof E != "string") throw new TypeError("encoding must be a string");

				if (n.length === 1) {
					const T = n.charCodeAt(0);
					(E === "utf8" && T < 128 || E === "latin1") && (n = T);
				}

				if (K === 0) throw new TypeError("The value \"" + n + "\" is invalid for argument \"value\"");
				for (b = 0; b < p - a; ++b) this[b + a] = T[b % K];
			}
			return this;
		};
		const u = {};
		function F(h, n, a) {
